# RAPath Indonesia

> Indonesia BPOM Medical Device Regulatory Reference

Plain English reference for Indonesia BPOM medical device regulation — registration, classification, and post-market obligations.

RAPath is an independent open-source project providing plain English navigation aids for medical device regulatory requirements. Content is written with AI assistance and derived from publicly available official sources only. Always verify against official regulatory sources before making any regulatory decisions. Not legal or regulatory advice.

## Sections

- [Start Here](https://rapath.org/id/start-here/what-is-a-medical-device)
- [Pre-Market](https://rapath.org/id/pre-market/classification)
- [Post-Market](https://rapath.org/id/post-market/overview)
- [Legislation](https://rapath.org/id/legislation/government-regulation-overview)
- [What's New](https://rapath.org/id/whats-new/regulatory-changes)

## Official Sources

- [BPOM (Badan Pengawas Obat dan Makanan)](https://www.pom.go.id/)
- [REGALKES (Registration System)](https://regalkes.kemkes.go.id/)
- [Ministry of Health — Medical Devices](https://farmalkes.kemkes.go.id/)
- [ASEAN AMDD](https://asean.org/asean-medical-device-directive/)

- [All Jurisdictions](https://rapath.org/#jurisdictions)
- [What's New](https://rapath.org/whats-new)
